pages.title: Meteors
pages.text: Independent of moon phase, meteors occasionally fall from the sky. A falling meteor impacts the ground and leaves a crater of $(l:materials/meteor_rock)Meteor Rock$() — the raw source of all Meteor-tier materials.$(br2)A $(l:materials/meteor_finder)Meteor Finder$() in your hand points toward the nearest unbroken meteor rock.

pages.title: Gleaning
pages.text: $(item)Gleaning Meteor Rock$() is a richer variant of the standard crater stone — drops more $(l:materials/meteor_dust)Meteor Dust$() per block. Look for the brighter streaks when sweeping a crater.
